title: 100mm Torx Screwdriver Bit Sets, 11pcs Star Magnetic Screwdriver Bits Set T6-T40 1/4 Inch S2 Steel Security Torx Screwdrivers Impact Driver Bit Set
features: 💚【Package Includes】You will receive 11pcs 100mm torx screwdriver bit sets, available in sizes T6, T7, T8, T9, T10, T15, T20, T25, T27, T30, T40. The shape of the torx security bit set is a hollow plum.
💙【Great Material】This star screwdriver bit set is made of high-quality S2 steel material with excellent hardness to reduce wear and tear that ensure long life.

💜【Nice Magnetic】Magnetic t15 torx screwdriver bits can be easily keep screws stuck to them, can improve your work efficiency. Each edge of the security torx bit set can be accurately locked screws, no damage to the screw and the screwdriver head.
🤎【Easy to Use】This torx screwdriver bits set can hold screws easily. The torx security screwdriver bits set can be used for electric screwdrivers, and the handle can also help to turn screws by hand.
🖤【Wide Application】The magnetic security torx screwdriver bits sets can be used for auto repair, motorcycles, bicycles, computers, furniture installation, home appliances and more.
